# OptiPro — llms.txt

## About

OptiPro is a French solo consultancy run by Pierre Laurent, based in Vence (06140), Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur.
Pierre helps artisans, freelancers, small businesses (TPE), and operations-heavy SMEs (logistics, transport, BTP) stop losing time to outdated tools and broken processes.
He audits operations, deploys custom ops tools (web apps, ERPs, automated reporting), and applies AI to operational workflows.

Pierre has 10 years of hands-on experience in logistics and operations management — first as e-commerce operations manager at Toute la Nutrition (400 orders/day), then as agency manager at DBS Drive (8,500 SKUs, daily contact with plumbers and HVAC contractors), then created an entire subsidiary from scratch at Eddifis (warehouse + EBP ERP deployment + KPIs + 80 k€/month revenue), then as Logistics & Operations Manager at Factory for 5 years (7 M€/year ADV portfolio, projects from 20 k€ to 1 M€, daily supervision of 15-20 subcontractor artisans), and most recently as Operations Manager at GL Events Live (event logistics warehouse, 6-person team). In April 2026, Pierre left operations to focus full-time on OptiPro.

He understands the day-to-day reality of both small business owners (artisans, TPE) and operations-heavy SMEs (logistics, transport, BTP): job-site constraints, ERP-to-field disconnects, subcontractor coordination, KPI fragmentation, and administrative overhead.

He launched OptiPro in 2025. One person. No sales rep. No subcontracting. Pierre analyzes, designs, and builds everything himself.

OptiPro is registered as an Entrepreneur Individuel (EI).
SIREN: 934 301 987 — APE code: 70.22Z (business and management consultancy)
VAT: not applicable (franchise en base de TVA, article 293 B du CGI)
Website: https://www.opti-pro.fr


## Services and Pricing

All prices are excluding VAT (HT). OptiPro is not subject to VAT.

### For artisans and freelancers

- **Visibility Pack** — 690 € — Google Business setup, 1-page website, 1h training — delivered in 3–5 days
- **Quote & Invoice Spreadsheet** — 390 € — Auto-calculations HT/TVA/TTC, payment tracking — 2–3 days
- **Telegram Notification Bot** — 290 € — Alerts for new contacts, payments, reminders — 1–2 days
- **One-off training** — 120 € — 1h video call: Google tools, admin basics, AI for your trade

### For small businesses (TPE/PME)

- **Professional website** — from 2,400 € — 3–5 custom pages, local SEO, smart contact form, 2h training — 2–3 weeks
- **Advanced automated spreadsheet** — from 590 € — Quotes, invoices, client tracking, custom scripts — 3–5 days
- **Advanced Telegram bot** — from 390 € — Create quotes from Telegram, auto reports, custom actions — 2–4 days
- **Custom training** — from 150 € — 1–2h video call: AI for your trade, tool onboarding, documentation

### For operations-heavy SMEs (logistics, transport, BTP) — NEW

- **Ops audit** — 1,200 € — Full diagnostic of operations: flows, ERP/TMS/WMS, subcontractors, reporting. Written deliverable with prioritized action plan and ROI estimates — 1 week
- **Automated weekly reporting** — 2,500 € — Consolidated KPIs (service rate, transport margin, delays, subcontractor performance) delivered every Monday morning. ERP/TMS/Excel/GPS integrations — 2 weeks
- **Subcontractor process redesign** — quote-based — Operational scoping and tooling to manage 10-50 subcontractors: service orders, field tracking, invoicing sync. 4-8 weeks
- **Monthly ops retainer** — 800 €/month (6-month minimum) — Weekly 1h check-in, 4h evolutions/month (rollable), priority support under 4h, applied AI/automation watch

### For larger or structural projects

- **Deep audit** — 490 € — 3–4h analysis, written report, precise estimate — 1 week — fee deducted if project signed
- **Full website + client portal** — from 5,000 € — Product catalog (1,000+ items), client space, online editing, performance tracking — 4–6 weeks
- **Custom web application** — quote-based — Co-built specs, tailored architecture, integrations, full training — 4–12 weeks
- **Full digital transformation** — from 10,000 € — Audit + full site + client portal + API integrations + automations + 1 month of training — 6–10 weeks

### Ongoing support

- **Monthly retainer** — 180 €/month (6-month minimum) — Technical maintenance, 1h of improvements per month (rollable 3 months), priority support under 24h, quarterly review


## Locations

Headquarters: Vence (06140), Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France
In-person work: available across the PACA region (Côte d'Azur, Nice, Cannes, Antibes, Marseille, etc.)
Remote work: available for all clients across France


## Contact

Email: p.laurent@opti-pro.fr
Response time: under 24 hours
First call: 30-minute free discovery call, no commitment
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pierre-laurent-809410123
Website: https://www.opti-pro.fr/contact


## Service Area

- PACA region: in-person or remote
- All of France: remote only
- No geographic restriction for digital/automation projects


## Key Facts

- Solo consultant: Pierre Laurent does all the work — no subcontracting, no account manager
- Experience: 10 years in operations, logistics, and supply chain (real-estate startup, GL Events, BTP sector)
- AI and automation specialist: proficient in workflow automation, no-code/low-code tools, AI integration
- Tech stack used for client projects: Next.js, Supabase, Google Sheets scripting, Telegram Bot API, Stripe, n8n/Make
- Launched: 2025
- Pricing: accessible — starts at 120 € for a one-off session, 690 € for a first full pack
- Payment: bank transfer or Stripe (card); installment payments available for projects over 1,000 €
- Free initial audit: every engagement starts with a free process audit


## What Makes Us Different

Most web agencies sell websites. OptiPro solves operational problems.

Pierre spent 10 years managing logistics, operations, and admin in industries where small errors cost real money — real estate, events, construction. He understands what it means to lose 2 hours a day on manual quotes, to miss a client follow-up, or to manage 40 subcontractors with a spreadsheet that breaks every week.

He pairs that operational background with deep expertise in AI tools and automation. He does not recommend tools for the sake of it. He identifies the exact friction, builds the minimum viable solution, and trains the client to use it independently.

One contact from start to finish. No handoff between sales, design, and dev. No agency overhead.


## FAQ

**Q: Do you only work with clients in the south of France?**
A: No. Pierre is based in Vence (06) but works 100% remotely with clients across France. In-person is available in the PACA region.

**Q: What is the minimum budget to work with OptiPro?**
A: 120 € for a one-off training session. 290 € for a first automation (Telegram bot). 690 € for the artisan starter pack (Google Business + 1-page site + training).

**Q: How long does it take to get a website?**
A: 3–5 days for a 1-page site (artisan pack). 2–3 weeks for a 3–5 page professional site. 4–6 weeks for a full site with client portal.

**Q: Do you work with clients who are not tech-savvy?**
A: Yes. Most clients are artisans, tradespeople, or small business owners with no technical background. Every delivery includes training and documentation.

**Q: Can you automate my existing tools (Google Sheets, email, invoicing)?**
A: Yes. Pierre audits your current tools first — for free — then builds automations that fit your existing workflow. He does not replace what works.

**Q: Do you subcontract work?**
A: No. Pierre handles everything: analysis, design, development, and delivery. No handoff to a third party.

**Q: Is the initial audit really free?**
A: Yes. Every engagement starts with a free 30-minute call and a process audit at no charge. The 490 € deep audit (for complex projects) is deducted from the project fee if you sign.

**Q: What sectors do you serve?**
A: Two main audiences. (1) Artisans and tradespeople (plumbers, electricians, carpenters, painters), freelancers, real estate professionals, restaurateurs, and any small business looking to reduce administrative overhead. (2) Operations-heavy SMEs in logistics, transport, BTP, distribution and event logistics — where Pierre's 10 years of operational background (ERP deployment, ADV portfolio management, subcontractor coordination, KPI structuring) creates direct value.


## Markdown Mirrors

Clean, nav-free, script-free Markdown versions of each public page.
Served as text/plain. Updated on each deployment.

- https://www.opti-pro.fr/services.md — Services and pricing
